results.title: ABC, CMA hold banking governance workshop in Battambang
results.description: The Association of Banks in Cambodia (ABC) and the Cambodia Microfinance Association (CMA) co-organised a workshop in Battambang province to strengthen governance, customer protection and operational excellence in the banking and financial sector. The post ABC, CMA hold banking governance workshop in Battambang appeared first on Khmer Times .

results.title: Q1 tourism dips in Central Visayas
results.description: Central Visayas tourist arrivals and hotel occupancy fell in Q1 2026 amid rising travel costs, despite hosting major ASEAN events.
